title: ReBeta
description: A mod aiming to improve the "golden age" experience for my custom modpack for minecraft 1.20.1
body:
Mod aiming to improve the minecraft beta-like experience for minecraft 1.20.1.

this mod is meant to be played with my (WIP) modpack.

[mod page will be updated soon with better discription, and a filled gallery!]

Main features of this mod currently are:
- Changed ore generation to be more like Minecraf's Pre-1.17 versions. 
  1) coal ore now generates uniformly, instead of trapezoid-like, from -64 to the world height limit
  2) gold ore now spawns uniformly, instead of trapezoid-like, and does not get disregarded by air exposure
  3) diamond ore no longer gets disregarded when exposed to air

This mod is verry much WIP, and supposed to be played using mod to get a Beta 1.7.3-like experience, but its main use if for my custom modpack doing just that. Currently this modpack has not been released, as it is still WIP, as is this mod
